version_description: The chords are unusual but accurate so you must use the ones that are outlined at the start, using any other variations won't sound right. No capo is needed and tuning is a Half-Step Down (Eb tuning).

versions.version_description: This version sounds like the studio version and uses the same chord variants. Enjoy.

tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
Tuning should be Eb (basically every string a half step down, like how Nirvana tuned up for most of their 
songs/performances).

This involves some pretty difficult chords, you must use the versions of the chords
that I have written below, otherwise it will not sound right. In reality, once you've remembered the chord 
shapes its pretty easy :)

[CHORDS]:
Em9: x 7 5 7 7 x
A/B: 7 x 7 6 5 x
Gm7: 3 x 4 4 3 x
Em/F# : 2 x 2 2 3 x
CMaj9: x 3 2 4 3 x
G/A: 5 x 5 4 3 x
Em: 0 2 2 0 0 0 
G: 3 5 5 4 3 3 
A: 5 7 7 6 5 5
Em7: x 7 9 7 8 7
B: 7 9 9 8 7 7
C/D: 10 x 10 9 8 x

[tab](Riff 1) Use this at "we can ride the boogie", or don't play a chord
e |--------------------------------------------------------|
B |--8/10--10--8--8--5/7--5--------------------------------|
G |--------------------------------------------------------|
D |--------------------------------------------------------|
A |--------------------------------------------------------|
E |--------------------------------------------------------|[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch] 
Girl, Close Your Eyes[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A/B[/ch]
Let That Rhythm Get Into You[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch]
Don't Try To Fight It[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A/B[/ch]
There Ain't Nothin' That You Can Do[/tab]


[Pre-Hook]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Em/F#[/ch]
Relax Your Mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj9[/ch]         [ch]G/A[/ch]
Lay Back And Groove With Mine[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Em/F#[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]       Riff 1
You Got To Feel That Heat...And We Can Ride The Boogie[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Em/F#[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Share That Beat Of Love[/tab]
 

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]A/B[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
I Wanna Rock With You (All Night)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]A/B[/ch]  [ch]C/D[/ch]
Dance You Into Day (Sunlight)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]A/B[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
I Wanna Rock With You (All Night)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G/A[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G/A[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
We're Gonna Rock The Night Away[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch]
Out On The Floor[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A/B[/ch]
There Ain't Nobody There But Us[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch]
Girl, When You Dance[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A/B[/ch]
There's A Magic That Must Be Love[/tab]

[Pre-Hook]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]          [ch]Em/F#[/ch]
Just Take It Slow[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj9[/ch]            [ch]G/A[/ch]
'Cause We Got So Far To Go[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Em/F#[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]       Riff 1
You Got To Feel That Heat...And We Can Ride The Boogie[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Em/F#[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Share That Beat Of Love[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]A/B[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
I Wanna Rock With You (All Night)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]A/B[/ch]  [ch]C/D[/ch]
Dance You Into Day (Sunlight)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]A/B[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
I Wanna Rock With You (All Night)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G/A[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G/A[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
We're Gonna Rock The Night Away[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                                   [ch]A7[/ch]
And When The Groove Is Dead And Gone (Yeah)[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Gm7[/ch]      [ch]Em/F#[/ch]
You Know That Love Survives[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Cmaj9[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
So We Can Rock Forever, On[/tab]


[There are a couple more chorus' left but the chords and correct chord shapes are the same]
